# 🧾 GitHub Issue Templates

Welcome to the **Issue Templates Directory** for this repository. The `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATES/` folder provides a categorized set of structured templates to ensure clarity, reduce triage time, and streamline collaboration across teams and contributors.

---

## 📁 Overview

These templates are here to:
- Standardize issue submissions
- Apply triage labels automatically
- Guide users through the appropriate workflow (bugs, features, infra, support, etc.)

---

## 🧩 Categories and Templates

### 🐛 Bug Reports
- `bug_report.yml` – General bugs and unexpected behavior
- `build_issue.yml` – Build system or CI/CD failures
- `browser_compatibility.yml` – Browser-specific issues
- `mobile_issue.yml` – Bugs on iOS, Android, or app stores
- `performance_issue.yml` – Latency, slowness, or bottlenecks
- `typo_report.yml` – Typo, grammar, or textual errors

### ⚙️ Infrastructure & Environment
- `infra_issue.yml` – Deployment, GCP, K8s, or Cloudflare-related issues
- `env_support_request.yml` – Help with setting up local/cloud environments (Bun, Docker, etc.)
- `CI_issue.yml` – CI/CD pipeline failures (e.g. Argo)
- `dependency_issue.yml` – Biome, Valibot, or package conflicts

### 🧠 Feature Development
- `feature_request.yml` – Propose a new feature
- `feature_migration_issue.yml` – Track feature rollout or deprecation
- `experimental_feature_feedback.yml` – Share feedback on beta features
- `tooling_integration.yml` – Suggest integration (e.g. Stripe, Umami)
- `integration_issue.yml` – Issues related to third-party tools
- `ui_feedback.yml` – SvelteKit UI/UX feedback

### 🧪 Research & Design
- `design_spec_proposal.yml` – Propose or review design specs
- `research_request.yml` – Request feasibility studies or technical investigations

### 📚 Documentation & Content
- `documentation_request.yml` – Request updates to documentation
- `tutorial_request.yml` – Request learning resources or guides
- `example_request.yml` – Ask for code samples or demos
- `content_request.yml` – Request visuals, diagrams, or non-code content
- `reuse_case_study.yml` – Share or request real-world applications
- `translation_request.yml` – Request translation or i18n support

### 🛠 Code Quality & Refactoring
- `code_refactor.yml` – Suggest structural code improvements
- `refactor_request.yml` – Propose targeted cleanup
- `tech_debt.yml` – Log or address technical debt

### 🛎️ Support & Help
- `support.yml` – General help requests
- `account_access_issue.yml` – Auth, login, or permission issues
- `enterprise_support_request.yml` – Enterprise/partner-specific support

### 🔄 Automation & Tasks
- `task_request.yml` – Request a specific task to be handled
- `automation_request.yml` – Suggest automation for repetitive work
- `handoff_request.yml` – Request a task/project to be reassigned

### 🧹 Triage & Moderation
- `duplicate_issue.yml` – Mark as duplicate
- `invalid_issue.yml` – Close/report non-actionable submissions
- `needs_more_info.yml` – Request additional details
- `triage.yml` – Internal-only triage and labeling

### 🤝 Community & Collaboration
- `mentorship_request.yml` – Request or offer mentorship
- `onboarding_feedback.yml` – Share feedback on onboarding experience
- `template_feedback.yml` – Suggest improvements to templates
- `community_suggestion.yml` – Propose community-driven initiatives

### 🧭 Governance & Policy
- `policy_proposal.yml` – Propose policy/process changes
- `governance_question.yml` – Ask about governance matters
- `code_of_conduct_violation.md` – Report misconduct or violations

### 📜 Licensing, Contracts & Billing
- `license_question.yml` – Ask about open-source license usage
- `contract_question.yml` – Raise legal or agreement-related questions
- `billing_issue.yml` – Billing, payment, or Stripe-related issues
- `sponsorship_interest.yml` – Express interest in sponsoring the project

### 🔌 API Changes & Compatibility
- `api_change.yml` – Propose or document changes to public APIs

### 🧯 Risk & Compliance
- `compliance_issue.yml` – Legal, regulatory, or compliance-related gaps
- `deprecation_notice.yml` – Mark a feature as deprecated
- `abandonment_notice.yml` – Flag abandoned projects or initiatives
- `postmortem.yml` – Share post-incident analysis or retrospectives
- `blocked_task.yml` – Track tasks blocked by dependencies

### 🧾 General Queries
- `question.yml` – Ask general questions not covered by other templates

---

## ⚙️ Labeling & Automation

The `config.yml` file links each template to triage labels like `bug`, `infra`, `support`, etc. This ensures:
- Faster routing to the right maintainers
- Smarter filtering and prioritization
- Seamless workflow integration

---

## 🧭 Usage Tips

- Use the **"New Issue"** button on GitHub to select the appropriate template.
- Complete all required fields to avoid delays.
- Not sure where to start? Begin with [`question.yml`](https://github.com/your-org/your-repo/issues/new?template=question.yml) or [`support.yml`](https://github.com/your-org/your-repo/issues/new?template=support.yml).

---

## 🔗 Quick Access Links

- [🐞 Submit a Bug Report](https://github.com/your-org/your-repo/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)  
- [✨ Request a Feature](https://github.com/your-org/your-repo/issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)  
- [📚 Request Documentation](https://github.com/your-org/your-repo/issues/new?template=documentation_request.yml)  
- [🆘 Get Support](https://github.com/your-org/your-repo/issues/new?template=support.yml)
